name: sysf.io
description: sysf.io builds custom fine-tuned AI models on Switzerland's sovereign open model, Apertus, and productizes them end-to-end with LangChain and LangGraph. Compliant by design, data-private, and deployed in Swiss or EU jurisdiction — or fully on-prem.
shortDescription: Swiss sovereign AI: custom models fine-tuned on Apertus, productized end-to-end, compliant by design.

baseModel.name: Apertus
baseModel.by: EPFL, ETH Zurich & the Swiss National Supercomputing Centre (CSCS)
